stories.summary: Four Republicans cross party lines to vote in favour of the measure.

stories.headline: Bitcoin’s Retreating Retail Army Exposes Fresh Fragility
stories.summary: Bitcoin spent years trying to shed its reputation as a playground for speculative retail traders. Its latest selloff is exposing the tradeoff: Wall Street brought scale and legitimacy, but the retail buyers who once helped absorb sharp declines have largely vanished.

stories.headline: Argentina evita Wall Street y consigue dólares por debajo del 7%
